content_fingerprint: dify adds real time collaboration and hitl api in version 1 14 0 the open source llm app development platform dify has shipped real time multi user workflow editing and a programmable human in the loop service api targeting teams that build and operate ai applications at scale dify released version 1 14 0 on april 29 2026 introducing a collaboration mode that allows multiple workspace members to edit the same workflow simultaneously with synchronized graph updates online presence indicators and shared visibility into who is active where the feature requires explicit opt in on self hosted deplo
